positions.title: AI/ML Engineer
positions.description:
Developed GPT-4 and LangChain-based enterprise search applications processing 120K+ documents, reducing manual research time by 48% and improving contextual response accuracy across internal operational and knowledge management workflows.
Built Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines using Pinecone and FAISS, improving semantic search precision by 37% while enabling faster retrieval across structured and unstructured enterprise datasets supporting business-critical operations.
Created FastAPI microservices deployed through Docker and AWS ECS, supporting low-latency inference workloads with average response times below 900 milliseconds across production AI application environments handling concurrent requests.
Fine-tuned transformer models using Hugging Face, PEFT, and LoRA techniques, reducing GPU memory consumption by 42% while improving multilingual text classification performance across customer support and analytics workflows.
Implemented prompt evaluation workflows using LangSmith and MLflow, decreasing hallucinated responses by 31% and improving consistency across conversational AI applications supporting enterprise knowledge assistance and internal automation processes.
Integrated Whisper speech-processing pipelines supporting multilingual transcription workloads, improving automated audio processing throughput by 44% and reducing manual transcription efforts across customer communication and operational support functions.
Automated deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions, Terraform, and AWS SageMaker, reducing model release cycles from several days to under six hours across cloud-based machine learning deployment environments successfully.
Improved inference throughput using ONNX Runtime and TensorRT optimization techniques, increasing processing performance by 2.6x while lowering infrastructure costs associated with enterprise AI inferencing workloads across cloud platforms.
Developed response validation workflows using Guardrails AI, reducing invalid outputs and prompt injection failures by 33% while improving reliability across enterprise-facing Generative AI applications used by operational teams daily.
Collaborated with software engineers, AI researchers, and cloud teams to deliver scalable AI solutions supporting enterprise automation, intelligent search, and operational efficiency initiatives across multiple internal business functions successfully.
achievements: Developed GPT-4 and LangChain-based enterprise search applications processing 120K+ documents, reducing manual research time by 48% and improving contextual response accuracy across internal operational and knowledge management workflows.

Built Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines using Pinecone and FAISS, improving semantic search precision by 37% while enabling faster retrieval across structured and unstructured enterprise datasets supporting business-critical operations.

Created FastAPI microservices deployed through Docker and AWS ECS, supporting low-latency inference workloads with average response times below 900 milliseconds across production AI application environments handling concurrent requests.

Fine-tuned transformer models using Hugging Face, PEFT, and LoRA techniques, reducing GPU memory consumption by 42% while improving multilingual text classification performance across customer support and analytics workflows.

Implemented prompt evaluation workflows using LangSmith and MLflow, decreasing hallucinated responses by 31% and improving consistency across conversational AI applications supporting enterprise knowledge assistance and internal automation processes.

Integrated Whisper speech-processing pipelines supporting multilingual transcription workloads, improving automated audio processing throughput by 44% and reducing manual transcription efforts across customer communication and operational support functions.

Automated deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions, Terraform, and AWS SageMaker, reducing model release cycles from several days to under six hours across cloud-based machine learning deployment environments successfully.

Improved inference throughput using ONNX Runtime and TensorRT optimization techniques, increasing processing performance by 2.6x while lowering infrastructure costs associated with enterprise AI inferencing workloads across cloud platforms.

Developed response validation workflows using Guardrails AI, reducing invalid outputs and prompt injection failures by 33% while improving reliability across enterprise-facing Generative AI applications used by operational teams daily.

Collaborated with software engineers, AI researchers, and cloud teams to deliver scalable AI solutions supporting enterprise automation, intelligent search, and operational efficiency initiatives across multiple internal business functions successfully.

positions.title: AI/ML Engineer
positions.description:
Developed machine learning solutions using Python, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn across healthcare analytics initiatives, improving predictive reporting accuracy by 29% and supporting operational decision-making across enterprise clinical environments effectively.
Built distributed machine learning pipelines using PyTorch and Apache Spark, processing more than 15 million healthcare records while reducing model training and data preparation time by 41% across analytics workflows.
Designed BERT and RoBERTa-based NLP models for medical document classification and entity extraction, improving clinical text processing accuracy by 34% while reducing manual review efforts across healthcare operations teams significantly.
Engineered semantic retrieval systems using LangChain, FAISS, and OpenAI embeddings, improving contextual healthcare search relevance by 39% across enterprise knowledge management and intelligent document discovery platforms supporting analytics initiatives.
Developed real-time inference pipelines using Kafka, Redis, and Spark Structured Streaming, reducing healthcare event processing latency by 46% while supporting scalable analytics across distributed operational systems and reporting environments effectively.
Implemented MLflow, Docker, GitHub Actions, and SageMaker deployment workflows, reducing model deployment turnaround time by 52% while improving release consistency across enterprise machine learning environments and production analytics platforms.
Improved inference efficiency using ONNX optimization and quantization strategies, decreasing response latency by 36% while supporting scalable deployment across enterprise healthcare analytics and intelligent automation applications successfully.
Applied SHAP and LIME explainability methods across predictive healthcare models, improving transparency for analysts and strengthening confidence in machine learning outputs supporting operational and compliance focused business decisions consistently.
Developed FastAPI and Flask backend services integrating machine learning models into healthcare analytics platforms, enabling real-time prediction capabilities and improving application responsiveness across operational reporting and business intelligence systems.
Worked with data engineers, analysts, and product stakeholders across cross-functional delivery teams, contributing to healthcare modernization initiatives supporting enterprise analytics, intelligent automation, and reporting transformation programs successfully.
